restriction_text: Patient must have type 2 diabetes mellitus. Must be used as monotherapy or in combination with other PBS-listed antidiabetic agents.
Patient must have type 2 diabetes mellitus. Must be used as monotherapy or in combination with other PBS-listed antidiabetic agents.

Patient must have documented history of severe active rheumatoid arthritis. Patient must have failed to achieve adequate response to prior therapy with at least two disease modifying anti-rheumatic drugs (DMARDs).
Patient must have previously received PBS-subsidised treatment with this drug for this condition and must have achieved an adequate response to treatment.

Patient must have treatment-resistant schizophrenia defined as failure to respond to adequate trials of at least two antipsychotic drugs. Authority approval is required from Services Australia prior to prescribing.
